reason: Agent successfully received and responded to a simple math question with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260504-195056-j50q" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page loaded with status "idle" and message input visible.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status indicator confirmed agent was "idle".
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message was typed into the input box and sent via send button.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Response was received within seconds, showing a new session "Quick Math Question Session" was created.
Verified the response mentions "4" - Agent response displayed "4" in the chat view, confirming the correct answer was provided.
